response.justification: Exceptional match with 19 years of full-stack experience significantly exceeding requirements. Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators directly addresses an emerging job requirement. Strong expertise in primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and proven ability to ship systems at scale. Minor gaps in specific tool mentions (Nest.js, Jest/Vitest, PostgreSQL) are unlikely blockers given demonstrated depth and learning track record across diverse technologies.
strengths: 19 years of full-stack experience significantly exceeds 6+ requirement; current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq focuses on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development—directly addressing stated emerging job needs

Expert-level TypeScript and Node.js with successful React deployments; proven track record shipping systems at scale (top 10 iOS apps, millions of emails annually, millions of HTTP requests per second)
Strong TDD and testing culture with modern infrastructure expertise (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes); demonstrated leadership through mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned despite strong TDD emphasis throughout resume—requires confirmation of hands-on experience
Nest.js framework not mentioned; while extensive Node.js backend experience is clear, specific framework familiarity needs verification
PostgreSQL absent from skills list; database experience covers MongoDB and MySQL but not the primary relational database specified in requirements

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent and MCP infrastructure work
Experience and seniority level (19 years, staff-level roles)
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Jest/Vitest, or PostgreSQL
